headline: Broadridge Establishes Strategic Glasgow Hub to Strengthen Global BPO Delivery
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), a global Fintech leader, today announced the opening of a newly established Glasgow center to provide technology-led business process outsourcing (BPO) services, further advancing the company's international expansion strategy aligned to global client demand.
